title: IFCX Drawing Exchange Format
description: Open-source alternative to DWG/DXF. Extends IFC with full 2D drawing capabilities.

objects.description: Non-graphical objects (layouts, plot settings, groups, etc.)

Handle.description: Unique hex handle identifier for cross-referencing

EntityRef.description: Reference to another entity/object by handle

Header.description: Drawing header with system variables (maps to DXF HEADER section)

variables.description: Additional system variables not explicitly modeled above

Tables.description: Named symbol tables (maps to DXF TABLES section)

appIds.description: Registered application IDs for extended data

style.description: Shape file or text style name

fontFamily.description: Primary font name or SHX file

bigFont.description: Big font file for CJK support

DimStyle.description: Dimension style - complete parametric control over dimension appearance

textGap.description: Gap around text on dimension line

extLineOffset.description: Gap between origin and ext line start

extLineExtension.description: How far ext line extends beyond dim line

CommonEntityProps.description: Properties shared by all graphical entities

layoutRef.description: Reference to layout for paper space entities

xdata.description: Extended data keyed by application name

majorAxisEndpoint.description: Endpoint of major axis relative to center

bulge.description: Tangent of 1/4 included arc angle. 0=straight, positive=CCW

richText.description: Structured rich text (alternative to formatting codes in text field)

overrideText.description: Text override (<> = measured value, empty = use measured)

ViewportEntity.description: Paper space viewport - window into model space

viewHeight.description: View height in model space units

scale.description: Effective viewport scale (view height / paper height)

uVector.description: U-direction vector (size and direction of one pixel)

faces.description: Each face is an array of vertex indices

LayoutObject.description: Drawing sheet layout (paper space or model space)
